message:
fix(http): validate Content-Length headers and reject malformed or conflicting values

- Change body_kind_from_response and body_kind_from_headers to return
  Result instead of BodyKind, propagating parse errors to callers
  instead of silently falling back to BodyKind::Eof when Content-Length
  contains non-numeric values like "nope"
- Reject conflicting Content-Length headers (multiple headers with
  different values) with a descriptive error instead of silently using
  whichever value was parsed last, preventing potential request
  smuggling or body desync issues
- Add invalid_content_length_is_error integration test that starts a
  one-shot server returning a non-numeric Content-Length and verifies
  the client surfaces the expected error message
- Update existing body_kind unit tests to unwrap the new Result return

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
